2026-03-03PMOPublic Service Employment ActAppointment of the Senior Diplomatic and International Policy Advisor to the Prime Minister and Personal Representative (Sherpa) of the Prime Minister for the G7 and G20 SummitsAppointment of David Morrison of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Senior Diplomatic and International Policy Advisor to the Prime Minister and Personal Representative (Sherpa) of the Prime Minister for the G7 and G20 Summits, Privy Council Office, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Senior Diplomatic and International Policy Advisor to the Prime Minister and Personal Representative (Sherpa) of the Prime Minister for the G7 and G20 Summits
precis: Appointment of David Morrison of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Senior Diplomatic and International Policy Advisor to the Prime Minister and Personal Representative (Sherpa) of the Prime Minister for the G7 and G20 Summits, Privy Council Office, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
